info.name: DashAI ERP API Testing - Local
info.description: Postman collection untuk testing backend DashAI ERP. Urutan run: Health → Auth Superadmin → Setup IDs → Module GET Tests → CRUD Smoke Tests → Owner Access Tests. Dibuat untuk base URL lokal FastAPI.

item.name: 02 - Setup IDs from Seed Data
item.description: Jalankan folder ini setelah login superadmin. Folder ini mengambil ID company, branch, product, finance, HR, dan CRM dari data seeder lalu menyimpannya ke environment.

item.name: Get NRT Branches - Store HQ/WH IDs

exec: const hq = branches.find(b => b.is_head_office === true || /HQ|Head Office/i.test(b.name || b.code || '')) || branches[0];
const wh = branches.find(b => /WH|Warehouse/i.test(b.name || b.code || '')) || branches[1] || hq;

item.name: 05 - CRUD Smoke Tests
item.description: Jalankan setelah Setup IDs. Request create memakai variabel ID dari data seed.

body.raw:
{
  "company_id": "{{company_id_nrt}}",
  "parent_category_id": null,
  "code": "TST-CAT-{{$timestamp}}",
  "name": "Test Category {{$timestamp}}",
  "description": "Created from Postman smoke test",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Jika backend kamu belum menambahkan image_url di schema ProductCreate, hapus field image_url dari body ini.

body.raw:

item.name: 06 - Owner Access Tests
item.description: Jalankan Login Owner NRT dulu. Tujuan: owner melihat data company sendiri, walau query company_id company lain tetap tidak boleh bocor.

item.name: Owner NRT - Try GKM Products Filter

exec: pm.test('Owner request with another company_id still returns 2xx and should be scoped by backend', function () {

item.name: 07 - Upload File Tests
item.description: Folder ini untuk fitur upload yang kamu tambahkan. Kalau endpoint /api/v1/files/upload belum ada, request akan 404 dan berarti route upload belum diregister di main.py.

request.description: Sebelum send, klik field file dan pilih gambar lokal. Kalau 404 berarti route files belum ditambahkan.

exec: pm.test('Upload should return URL when file selected', function () {

item.name: 99 - Cleanup Optional
item.description: Hati-hati: request ini menghapus data yang dibuat oleh smoke test.
